summary: project_tags already populated for all 195 BimodalLogic entries; cslib has zero entries; Tier 1 needs --project flag in literature-search.sh filtering by doc_id IN (set from index.json); Tier 2 needs jq filter in literature-retrieve.sh before scoring; project detected via git root basename
